issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for load testing scenarios.

scenarios.name: Ramped load test for /api/users with pass/fail thresholds
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote a k6 script but used flat VUs and only a single threshold, missing the staged ramp-up/steady/ramp-down and the combined http_req_duration p(95) + http_req_failed rate thresholds plus check() pattern; treatment used the stages array, both threshold types, and check() with status + duration assertions.

scenarios.name: Track custom login success metrics
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relied solely on built-in http metrics with no business-level instrumentation; treatment imported Trend, Counter, and Rate from k6/metrics, instantiated them at module scope, and updated each inside the default function as documented.
